parameters.content:
## Routing Of Medical Equipment Enquiry
### How it works

The workflow is triggered when a new form is submitted.
It immediately records the submission data by appending or updating a row in a Google Sheet.
The workflow then checks if the submitter's email uses a free domain provider.
If it is a free domain, it sends a quick Slack message and stops further processing.
For business domains, it retrieves the full lead data from the sheet and evaluates conditions to determine the proper route.
Depending on the routing rules, it sends a targeted Slack notification to prompt either immediate action or a follow-up campaign.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Connect your Google Sheets credentials and select the target spreadsheet and worksheet.
- [ ] Configure the Form Trigger to correctly map incoming submission fields.
- [ ] Set up Slack credentials and select the correct channels for all notification nodes.
- [ ] Adjust the If and Switch node conditions to match your specific lead routing logic.

### Customization

You can customize the list of domains considered "free" and adjust the Slack channels to route high-priority business leads directly to specific team members.

## Form Trigger and Save

Receives form submissions and saves the initial data to a Google Sheet.

## Filter Free Domains

Checks the submitted email address to determine if it belongs to a free domain.

## Free Domain Alert

Sends a Slack notification for submissions using a free email domain.

## Retrieve and Route Leads

Fetches business lead data from the sheet and evaluates conditions to determine the appropriate routing.

## Execute Routing Actions

Fires specific Slack notifications based on the routing outcome for business domains.

parameters.formDescription: This is a client project demo, more of an MVP, intended for distributors of medical equipment specifically.

nodes.name: Post Free Domain Alert to Slack

main.node: Post Free Domain Alert to Slack
